This branch exists only to preserve the historical PR trail after extracting the DevOps Challenge into its own repository.

## Original Body

This PR adresses the following enhancements:

- [x] Added copiable Repository URL
- [x] Added checkboxes for students to confirm their GitHub profile details and independent challenge completion before proceeding.
- [x] Improved UI feedback by displaying the repository URL and admission/waitlist messages based on ranking.
- [x] Enhanced developer profile fetching by preventing unnecessary retries on 404 errors.
- [x] Added GitHub username validation and ensured query invalidation on assessment errors.
- [x] Prettier Assessment UI
- [x] Admission message for manually passed students.

## Summary by CodeRabbit

- **New Features**
	- Introduced an interactive assessment interface with real-time status updates, clear messaging on results, and controls for managing attempts.
	- Added a repository information display featuring clickable links, copy-to-clipboard functionality, and visual badges indicating assessment outcomes.
	- Enhanced the GitHub username input with improved validation and accessibility feedback.
	- Added a new `Assessment` component for managing assessments and user interactions.
	- Introduced a new `RepositoryInformation` component to display developer profile data.

- **Refactor & Bug Fixes**
	- Refined error handling during profile retrieval for clearer user feedback, including handling scenarios where the profile may not be available.
	- Simplified component interactions by delegating internal logic to dedicated, streamlined components.
	- Updated error handling in assessment triggering to ensure relevant data is refetched upon errors.
	- Enhanced error handling logic in the `DevOpsChallengeDataShell` component for better control flow.
	- Adjusted UI structure in the `DevOpsChallengePage` for a more streamlined layout.
	- Updated the structure of the `DeveloperProfile` type for improved clarity and functionality.
	- Improved validation logic for the GitHub username input to enhance user experience.
	- Modified handling of errors in the developer profile fetching process to return `undefined` when applicable.
